notes: Deduplicated master list of UV Express routes compiled from LTFRB franchise database, Moovit, and 14 corridor/city validation analyses. Covers ~112 unique routes (~45% of estimated 250 total NCR UV routes). High-confidence routes confirmed by 2+ sources or from official LTFRB franchise records with N/C code. Fares primarily from 2020 re-opening data; may be outdated. Geometry not available for any UV Express route.
